remarks: This spacious studio has room for everything! The open floor plan allows space for dining, an at-home office, and living room. The large living area is easily converted into a sleeping area with the convenient Murphy Bed that is included in the rental. There is also a huge walk-in closet and tons of storage throughout the unit. A full bathroom and open kitchen completes this space and makes it perfect for those who work in the city or Downtown Stamford. The heat and hot water are included in the low monthly rent and there is a reserved spot in the indoor parking garage (#19). On top of that, there is on-site laundry! Do not miss this opportunity to be close to restaurants, shops, and entertainment! Fantastic credit and excellent references required.
